nasb.text: The governor said to them that they should not eat from the most holy things until a priest arose with Urim and Thummim.

esv.text: The governor told them that they were not to partake of the most holy food until a priest with Urim and Thummim should arise.

cnv.text: 省長告訴他們不可吃至聖之物，直等到有能用烏陵和土明來決疑的祭司興起來。

ccb.text: 省长吩咐他们不可吃至圣之物，直到使用乌陵和土明的祭司出现。
